generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (decrease trust), and the astroturf petition campaign (T2, weeks-long) supplies confirmatory social proof and elite-distrust cues that resonate with this profile's very low Agreeableness (trust at 11th pct, straightforwardness at 19th pct) and high Extraversion (activity level 100th pct, gregariousness 83rd pct), making her likely to encounter and be swayed by visible petition-signing peers; however, her moderate Neuroticism (57th pct) and high self-consciousness (66th pct) limit deep engagement, so movement is modest (28 points) rather than large.

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: intensify and solidify an already negative opinion on Trust In Mainstream Journalism — push it further in the negative direction
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
